scenarios.name: Priya Sharma
scenarios.label: Legitimate User
scenarios.explanation: All four trust signals align with the account owner's established profile. Device fingerprint FP_8892A has been active for 14 months. Location matches the user's registered home city. No SIM routing changes detected. Approving with zero friction.

scenarios.name: Rahul Mehta
scenarios.label: Coffee Shop User
scenarios.explanation: Unknown device detected — this is the first recovery attempt from FP_5541B. However, the location matches the user's known work city and SIM is stable. Risk is moderate. Routing to Blink Liveness Verification to confirm physical presence before granting access.

scenarios.name: Unknown Actor
scenarios.label: SIM Swap Attacker

signals.name: Geo Location
signals.value: Mumbai, MH — last seen: London, UK (45 min ago)

scenarios.explanation: CRITICAL THREAT DETECTED. Three simultaneous red flags: (1) Unrecognised device fingerprint FP_0019X. (2) Impossible travel — account last accessed from London 45 minutes ago; current attempt from Mumbai. (3) SIM swap confirmed — carrier identity changed 6 hours ago. Auto-block engaged. Account Protection Mode activating.
